query:
ALTER TABLE crm_ai_global_config 
  ADD COLUMN autoReplyEnabled TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN workingHoursStart INT DEFAULT 8,
  ADD COLUMN workingHoursEnd INT DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN workingHoursEnabled TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN maxMessagesPerLead INT DEFAULT 10,
  ADD COLUMN maxMessagesEnabled TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN personality VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'amigavel',
  ADD COLUMN inactiveDispatchEnabled TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN inactiveDispatchHours INT DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN inactiveDispatchMessage TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN inactiveDispatchMaxPerDay INT DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN inactiveDispatchLastRun BIGINT DEFAULT NULL;
